products.name: PHILIPS B22 10-Watt LED Cool Day White Smart Bulb, with Wi-Fi, 16M Colors & Dimmable, Works with Alexa & Google Assistant (Only B22)
products.hook: Apne boring hostel room ko viral setup banao, budget mein! ✨ Philips Smart Bulb ka deal dekho!
products.pain: Hostel ki woh sadharan yellow light se mood off ho jata hai? Ya study ke time pe proper lighting nahi milti? Aur RGB vibes bhi chahiye par budget tight hai?
products.fix: Ye Philips ka smart bulb, bhai, ₹1000 wala ₹349 mein mil raha hai! Pure 65% off! 16 Million colors hain, dim bhi kar sakte ho, aur phone se control hota hai (Wi-Fi se!). Alexa/Google Assistant se bhi connect kar lo. Mood ke hisaab se light set karo – study ke liye bright white, movie night ke liye soft blue, ya party ke liye disco vibes! Hostel room ko instantly upgrade karo, sab puchenge 'bhai kahan se liya?'
products.loot_reason: A branded Philips smart bulb, usually ₹999, at just ₹349. It's a proper budget-friendly upgrade for any student's room.

products.name: Generic USB Multiport Hub 4 in 1 USB Extension Cable Adapter Splitter with LED Indicator Compatible with Laptops, PC, Keyboard, Mouse, HDD, Printers, Pen Drives & More for All (Multi color, Pack of 1)
products.hook: Hostel ka most underrated hack, pata hai? Ye 4-in-1 USB Hub! 🔥 Loot lo bhai, ₹200 se bhi kam mein!
products.pain: Laptop mein ports kam pad jaate hain? Mouse, keyboard, pen drive, phone charger, aur har cheez ke liye alag-alag port dhundte rehte ho? Ya friend ka pen drive lagana hai aur apna charger nikalna padta hai?
products.fix: Bas ₹199 mein ye 4-in-1 USB Hub le lo! ₹1000 ki cheez 80% off pe! Ek laptop port se chaar banao, aur saare gadgets ek saath connect karo. LED indicator se pata bhi chalega kaunsa device active hai. Files transfer karni ho ya multiple devices use karne hon, ab koi jhanjhat nahi. Chhota sa gadget, par hostel life ka game-changer!
products.loot_reason: This is a ₹999 item selling for just ₹199, a solid 80% discount – essential tech at a throwaway price!

products.name: boAt Rockerz 255 Neo in-Ear Bluetooth Neckband with ASAP Charge, 12mm Drivers, IPX6, Dual Pairing, BT V5.2(Active Black)
products.hook: Bhai, ye price glitch hai ya kya? 😱 boAt ke neckband pe itna discount?! Abhi loot lo!
products.pain: Hostel mein padhna hai par roommates ka shor ya gaane bajte rehte hain? Ya library mein bhi focus nahi banta, aur calls pe privacy bhi nahi milti?
products.fix: Ye Rockerz 255 Neo ₹3500 wala neckband abhi sirf ₹499 mein mil raha hai! Pure 85% off! Crystal clear sound, ASAP charge matlab 10 min mein 10 ghante ka backup. Aur IPX6 rating, toh thode sweat ya paani se bhi koi tension nahi. Apni duniya mein ghus ke padhai karo, lectures suno ya chill karo, koi disturb nahi karega. Limited time deal hai, jaldi grab kar!
products.loot_reason: Normal price is ₹3490, but you're getting it for just ₹499. This is literally a steal, Amazon ne galti se itna dump kar diya hai lagta hai!

products.name: Portable Mini USB Desk Fan (Silent & Powerful)
products.hook: Sunn, summer aa raha hai, aur ye cheez hostel mein must-have hai. Honest advice de raha hoon.
products.pain: Garmi mein hostel ka AC/cooler kab chalta hai pata nahi. Padhai ke time pasina aur irritation alag, concentrate karna mushkil ho jata hai.
products.fix: Ye chhota sa USB fan seedha laptop ya power bank se chala. Silent hai aur hawa mast deta hai, poora vibe set ho jayega. Exam time mein concentration badhayega, garmi se bachayega. Is price pe toh soch mat, seedha order kar de, practical deal hai!
products.loot_reason: Iska usual price ₹699 hai, abhi sirf ₹199 mein mil raha hai, seedha 71% off. Bina soche le le!

products.name: Portable Rechargeable LED Desk Lamp with 3 Brightness Modes
products.hook: OMG! Ye wali lamp itne saste mein? Meri aankhon ko vishwas nahi ho raha! 🤯
products.pain: Raat bhar padhna hai par roommates light off kar dete hain? Ya fir table lamp pe jagah nahi hoti aur charging point bhi door hai?
products.fix: Ye compact rechargeable lamp tera best friend ban jayega. Kahin bhi laga, bina wire ke! 3 brightness levels hain, aankhon ko bhi strain nahi. Padhai bhi hogi aur roomies ko disturb bhi nahi hoga. Exam nights ka ultimate savior, itna bada discount phir nahi milega!
products.loot_reason: Ye lamp hamesha ₹899 se kam mein nahi milta, abhi ₹249 mein hai, 72% ka seedha discount!

products.name: Smart RGB LED Strip Lights with Remote
products.hook: Bhai ye price glitch hai ya kya? 😱
products.pain: Teri drab si hostel wall aur boring study desk pe vibe nahi aati? Social media pe sabke room itne cool lagte hain, tera kyun nahi?
products.fix: Ye RGB lights poori room ki kaaya palat dengi, mood ban jayega padhne ka bhi! Remote se colour change kar, party kar ya chill. Apne room ko instant Instagram-ready bana! Aur bhai, 70% off! Jaldi le, stock khatam ho jayega!
products.loot_reason: Usually ₹999 mein milta hai, abhi sirf ₹299 mein, poora 70% off! Ye deal phir nahi milegi.

products.name: Zebronics Zeb-SOUND BOMB 9 Wireless Earbuds
products.hook: Achha sun, agar ek solid deal chahiye under ₹500, toh ye Zebronics TWS dekh le.
products.pain: Budget tight hai, par wired earphones ki life se pak gaya hai? Ek decent sound quality aur reliable earbuds chahiye?
products.fix: Ye Zebronics Zeb-SOUND BOMB 9 ₹499 mein de rahe hain, upar se Made in India aur 30 घंटे का प्लेबैक! Gaming mode bhi hai, lectures bhi sunn lega, aur splash proof bhi hai. Hostel mein daily use ke liye best hai, na tension na zyada kharcha.
products.loot_reason: Normally ₹1699 ka bikta hai, abhi ₹499 mein mil raha hai, practical aur budget-friendly deal!

products.name: pTron Bassbuds F-M9 True Wireless Stereo Earbuds
products.hook: Abe yaar, ye pTron TWS ₹499 mein? Bhai, meri aankhein khuli ki khuli reh gayi! 😳 Stock khatam hone se pehle order kar!
products.pain: Hostel mein group study chal rahi hai aur tujhe apni podcast sunni hai? Ya midnight assignments pe kaam karte time distractions se bachna hai?
products.fix: Ye pTron Bassbuds F-M9 sirf ₹499 mein mil rahe hain, upar se digital display aur 32 घंटे का टोटल प्लेबैक! ENC Tech hai, matlab calls crystal clear. Aur kya chahiye, bhai?
products.loot_reason: Iska original price ₹3599 hai, abhi ₹499 mein legendary deal hai, aisa mauka dobara nahi aayega!

products.name: boAt Rockerz 255 Neo in-Ear Bluetooth Neckband
products.hook: Bhai, ye boAt ka neckband dekh! Price glitch hai ya kya? 😱 Fatak se utha le!
products.pain: Hostel mein sabke saamne loud music ya calls ka issue hai? Ya study karte time wired earphones tang karte hain?
products.fix: Ye boAt Rockerz 255 Neo ₹399 mein, upar se 25 घंटे की बैटरी लाइफ! Wireless freedom, mast bass aur class calls sab smooth! Lecture sunna ho ya chill karna ho, perfect hai. Wired ki jhanjhat khatam, aur kya chahiye?
products.loot_reason: Typically ₹2990 ka milta hai, abhi ₹399 mein mil raha hai – itna bada discount phir nahi milega!
